hooks.command: sh -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; bootstrap_dir="${CODEX_PLUGINS_BOOTSTRAP_DIR:-.codex/cc-plugins}"; case "$bootstrap_dir" in /*) bootstrap_root="$bootstrap_dir" ;; *) bootstrap_root="$root/$bootstrap_dir" ;; esac; bootstrap_runner="$bootstrap_root/codex/plugins/ox/scripts/run_if_changed.py"; repo_runner="$root/codex/plugins/ox/scripts/run_if_changed.py"; if [ -f "$bootstrap_runner" ]; then runner="$bootstrap_runner"; elif [ -f "$repo_runner" ]; then runner="$repo_runner"; else echo "ox hook runner not found; checked $bootstrap_runner and $repo_runner" >&2; exit 2; fi; exec python3 "$runner" --runtime codex --action fast'

sh -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; bootstrap_dir="${CODEX_PLUGINS_BOOTSTRAP_DIR:-.codex/cc-plugins}"; case "$bootstrap_dir" in /*) bootstrap_root="$bootstrap_dir" ;; *) bootstrap_root="$root/$bootstrap_dir" ;; esac; bootstrap_runner="$bootstrap_root/codex/plugins/ox/scripts/run_if_changed.py"; repo_runner="$root/codex/plugins/ox/scripts/run_if_changed.py"; if [ -f "$bootstrap_runner" ]; then runner="$bootstrap_runner"; elif [ -f "$repo_runner" ]; then runner="$repo_runner"; else echo "ox hook runner not found; checked $bootstrap_runner and $repo_runner" >&2; exit 2; fi; exec python3 "$runner" --runtime codex --action slow'
